task: Implement Floating Action Button (FAB) with Thể Lệ right-side drawer and Viết KUDOS modal. FAB has collapsed/expanded states with animation. Thể Lệ drawer slides from right with static SAA 2025 rules content. Viết KUDOS modal includes full form: recipient autocomplete, rich text editor, hashtag picker (min 1/max 5 from DB), image upload (max 5, Supabase Storage), anonymous toggle. Server actions: searchProfiles, getHashtags, submitKudos. FAB integrated into auth-protected layout visible on all protected pages.
acceptanceCriteria: FAB displays at bottom-right on homepage and awards page
Click collapsed button expands FAB showing 3 sub-buttons with animation
Click × collapses FAB back to collapsed state
Click outside FAB while expanded collapses it
Click Thể Lệ opens right-side drawer, FAB closes
Thể Lệ drawer slides in from right with animation
Escape key closes Thể Lệ drawer
Click backdrop closes Thể Lệ drawer
Viết KUDOS button in FAB opens modal, FAB closes
Viết KUDOS button in drawer footer closes drawer and opens modal
Kudos modal has recipient autocomplete searching profiles table
Kudos modal has rich text editor with B/I/S/OL/Link/Quote toolbar
Kudos modal has hashtag picker: min 1, max 5, from hashtags table
Kudos modal has image upload: max 5, JPG/PNG/WEBP, max 5MB each
Kudos modal has anonymous toggle that sets sender_id to null
Submit button disabled until recipient + content + at least 1 hashtag filled
Submit calls submitKudos action inserting kudos + kudos_hashtags + kudos_images
Success toast appears after submit
npm run test passes: 78 unit tests pass
npm run build passes with 0 errors
blastRadius: Auth-protected pages (homepage, awards). FAB is layout-level — affects all protected pages. Supabase tables: kudos, kudos_hashtags, kudos_images, profiles (read), hashtags (read). Supabase Storage: new bucket kudos-images. Route structure: pages moved into (protected) route group — URLs unchanged.

contracts.submitKudos: SubmitKudosPayload → { data: { id: string } } | { error: string }
contracts.searchProfiles: query: string → { data: ProfileResult[] } | { error: string }
contracts.uploadKudosImage: File + userId → public URL string (throws on error)
